title: HIGHEST PASS-RATE LEVER: a red build-selfcheck must REFUSE the build deliverable (E2 correction ladder in-phase) — cycle-1008's builder recorded ./cmd/evolve failing in build-selfcheck.json and handed off anyway; 983 never ran it
why: ULTRATHINK FAIL-ANALYSIS 2026-07-21 (37 post-fix cycles, 13 FAILs): 4 of 13 FAILs (983, 1007-partial, 1008, 1009) were mechanical defects the builder could have caught pre-handoff — and the mechanism ALREADY EXISTS: build-selfcheck.json (toolchain green per changed package). SMOKING GUN: worktree cycle-1008's build-selfcheck.json records ./cmd/evolve FAILING, yet the build phase completed and the cycle burned coverage-gate+compat+adversarial+bug-repro+audit (~5M tokens) before the ACS toolchain gate refused ship. 983 produced NO selfcheck artifact at all (TestChangedPackagesToolchainGreen skipped 'toolchain gate inert'). The selfcheck is advisory when it must be a floor.
how_to_apply: Wire the existing artifact into the existing gate seam — near-zero new machinery: (1) the deliverable contract for phase=build (internal/deliverable, the E2 reviewer seam) REQUIRES build-selfcheck.json present AND all-green for the changed-package set; missing or red => REJECT the build deliverable, which fires the EXISTING E2 correction ladder (builder fixes in-phase, bounded retries) instead of burning 4 downstream phases + a cycle; (2) builder persona: selfcheck is the LAST act before handoff, mandatory; (3) tdd-phase parity: same check for the tdd deliverable (its tests must compile+run); (4) keep the ACS TestChangedPackagesToolchainGreen as the independent backstop (defense in depth, never remove). Wiring proof: composed test — a build handing off a red selfcheck must be rejected at the contract gate and corrected in-phase, never reach audit. Economics: converts a ~12.5M-token FAIL cycle into an in-phase iteration (~1-2M).
evidence: .evolve/worktrees/cycle-21f9f7ae-1008/.evolve/build-selfcheck.json (records ./cmd/evolve red at handoff); cycle-983 missing artifact + coverage FAIL; cycle-1009 identical toolchain red; acs buildselfcheck/TestChangedPackagesToolchainGreen excerpts 1008/1009; E2 correction ladder cyclerun_review.go (the seam to reuse).
